data.description:

Uniphar PLC ( (GB:UPR) ) has shared an announcement.

Uniphar plc disclosed that Allianz Global Investors GmbH has built a significant shareholding in the company, holding 17,776,553 ordinary shares as of 11 March 2026. This stake represents 6.85% of Uniphar’s issued share capital, indicating a notable level of institutional investor interest in the group and potentially strengthening its capital markets profile.

The increased holding by Allianz Global Investors may be interpreted as a vote of confidence in Uniphar’s strategy and long-term prospects. It also modestly reshapes the company’s shareholder base, a development that existing investors and market observers may watch closely for any future governance or strategic implications.

More about Uniphar PLC

Uniphar plc is an Ireland-based healthcare services company that operates across the pharmaceutical and medical sectors. The group typically focuses on providing distribution, commercial, and related support services to manufacturers and healthcare providers in domestic and international markets.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance Reports Strong 2025 Results
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chicago Atlantic Real Estate ate Finance Inc ( (REFI) ) just unveiled an update.

Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance on March 12, 2026 reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, highlighting net interest income of $14.2 million for the quarter and $55.4 million for the year, with quarterly net income of $8.2 million and annual diluted net income of $36.0 million. The REIT maintained a steady dividend of $0.47 per share, ended 2025 with $411.1 million of total loan principal across 26 portfolio companies and a 16.3% gross unlevered yield, while keeping more than 90% of its loan book insulated from further interest rate declines and building a $616 million investment pipeline that management said positioned the platform for a potentially pivotal 2026 amid evolving federal regulatory developments.

Management emphasized that new originations produced net portfolio growth in 2025 despite broader sector headwinds in credit quality, lower rates and competition, pointing to modest leverage with a 32.0% debt-to-equity ratio and book value of $14.60 per share at year-end. The combination of strong borrower demand for growth capital and potential regulatory relief that has improved equity valuations and borrower sentiment suggests continued opportunities for Chicago Atlantic, reinforcing its strategy of targeting resilient operators while seeking to preserve yields and protect shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (REFI) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chicago Atlantic Real Estate ate Finance Inc stock, see the REFI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on REFI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, REFI is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance and very compelling valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield). This is tempered by weak technical momentum (below major moving averages with negative MACD) and a moderately positive earnings outlook that includes some pressure on net interest income.

To see Spark’s full report on REFI stock, click here.

More about Chicago Atlantic Real Estate ate Finance Inc

Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc., listed on Nasdaq under the ticker REFI, is a commercial mortgage real estate investment trust focused on private credit. The company concentrates on lending to what it describes as strong operators in select U.S. states, emphasizing disciplined underwriting, collateral protection and shareholder returns in niche segments of the financial services and real estate credit markets.

data.title: Verano Holdings Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results, Strategic Moves
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Verano Holdings ( (TSE:VRNO) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Verano reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $207 million, up 2% sequentially but down 5% year-on-year, with gross margin at 51% and adjusted EBITDA of $56 million, while posting a net loss of $183 million due largely to lower impairment charges versus 2024. For full-year 2025, revenue fell 6% to $822 million and net loss narrowed to $258 million, as the company streamlined operations, cut SG&A, and maintained a 28% adjusted EBITDA margin despite softer top-line performance.

Management highlighted achieving top-three market share across all categories, redomiciling from Canada to Nevada to position for potential U.S. capital markets access, settling legacy litigation, and winning a conditional vertical license in Texas ahead of a planned medical expansion. Verano also closed a new $195 million senior secured term loan at an initial 9.5% rate that it characterizes as among the industry’s most favorable, bolstering liquidity and funding measured capex of $41 million in 2025 and a guided $30–50 million range for 2026 aimed at efficiency upgrades and selective retail growth.

The company generated $53 million in operating cash flow in 2025, down from $112 million in 2024, reflecting inventory adjustments and higher tax payments, but continued to invest in automation, CPG technology, and marketing to support brand strength amid price compression and intensified competition. With existing or pending operations in Florida, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Texas, Verano argues it is well-positioned to benefit from potential U.S. federal rescheduling of cannabis and state-level medical program expansion in what it expects could be a pivotal 2026 for the sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VRNO) stock is a Hold with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Verano Holdings stock, see the TSE:VRNO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:VRNO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:VRNO is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects significant challenges in financial performance and technical analysis, with declining revenues, profitability issues, and stagnant price trends. However, positive corporate events provide some optimism for future growth and market expansion. The valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings and lack of dividends.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:VRNO stock, click here.

More about Verano Holdings

Verano Holdings Corp., listed on Cboe Canada and OTCQX, is a multi-state cannabis operator focused on branded consumer packaged goods and retail in key U.S. medical and adult-use markets. The company sells cannabis products across multiple categories and has secured top-three market share positions in every category where it competes, according to third-party data.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$2.17B

See more data about VRNO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Aveanna to Acquire Family First Homecare in Cash Deal
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aveanna Healthcare Holdings ( (AVAH) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 9, 2026, Aveanna subsidiary Pediatric Services of America, LLC agreed to acquire all membership interests of Family First Holding, LLC, a multi-state pediatric home care provider operating as Family First Homecare, for $175.5 million in cash, subject to customary adjustments. Aveanna plans to fund the deal with cash on hand and borrowings under its existing short-term credit facility, and expects the transaction to close in the second fiscal quarter of 2026, pending regulatory clearance and other standard closing conditions.

Family First Homecare, founded in 2012, delivers skilled Private Duty Nursing through 27 locations across seven states, and its acquisition will expand Aveanna’s pediatric home care footprint and reinforce its specialized care model for medically fragile children. Executives from both companies highlighted strong cultural alignment and a shared focus on high-quality, patient-centered care, suggesting the deal could strengthen Aveanna’s competitive position and create added value for patients, payers, and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVAH) stock is a Hold with a $8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aveanna Healthcare Holdings stock, see the AVAH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AVAH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AVAH is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects weak financial foundation (high leverage and low profitability) and only modest technical momentum, partially offset by strong recent operating performance, raised guidance, and a mid-range valuation.

To see Spark’s full report on AVAH stock, click here.

More about Aveanna Healthcare Holdings

Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc., based in Atlanta, is a diversified home care provider focused on medically complex, high-cost pediatric and adult patient populations across 38 U.S. states. Its services span skilled nursing, rehabilitation and therapy, school-based nursing, day treatment centers, home health and hospice, enteral nutrition delivery, case management, and respite care, positioning the company as a lower-cost alternative to prolonged hospitalization.

The company coordinates care among payers, physicians, hospitals, and other providers to support families and improve outcomes while managing costs. Aveanna’s broad geographic footprint and comprehensive home- and community-based services underpin its strategy to deliver high-quality, patient-centered care at scale.

Average Trading Volume: 1,202,202

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.47B

data.title: Powermax Minerals Identifies Priority Rare Earth Targets at Cameron Project in B.C.
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Powermax Minerals, Inc. ( (TSE:PMAX) ) has issued an announcement.

Powermax Minerals reported encouraging soil and surface rock assay results from its Cameron rare earth elements project in British Columbia, where geochemical sampling returned elevated total rare earth oxide values and outlined a north-south corridor of anomalous mineralization extending over one kilometre. The alignment of soil anomalies, anomalous pegmatite rock samples and historical thorium-uranium showings has defined multiple priority targets, and the company plans further work to pinpoint bedrock REE sources and advance the most prospective zones toward drilling.

The exploration program’s soil samples averaged about 340 ppm TREO, with highs up to 2,840 ppm, while selective rock grab samples returned up to 741 ppm TREO in clusters along Highway 23 and near the Cameron (Jenkins) showing. These results suggest the presence of REE-bearing pegmatite bodies beneath shallow overburden, supporting Powermax Minerals’ efforts to upgrade the Cameron project’s prospectivity and potentially strengthen its position in the emerging Canadian rare earth exploration space.

More about Powermax Minerals, Inc.

Powermax Minerals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on rare earth element prospects in British Columbia, with its flagship Cameron REE Property located south of Revelstoke along a major transportation corridor. The company targets NYF-type pegmatite-hosted rare earth mineralization, positioning itself within the critical minerals supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 524,963

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

See more insights into PMAX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Abitibi Metals Secures 80% of B26 Deposit and Launches Largest Drill Program
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Abitibi Metals ( (TSE:AMQ) ) is now available.

Abitibi Metals has exercised early its option on the B26 Polymetallic Deposit, lifting its stake to 80% and becoming majority owner and operator alongside minority partner SOQUEM. The move consolidates control over a high-grade copper-gold project in Quebec and formalizes a joint venture structure with Abitibi as manager overseeing exploration and development decisions.

The B26 mineral resource has grown 124% in under three years, underscoring the deposit’s expanding scale and prominence among emerging polymetallic systems in the region. Abitibi is preparing a fully funded 40,000-metre drill program for 2026, its largest to date, aimed at expanding resources, improving confidence in key zones, and testing regional targets, which could materially advance project economics and long-term growth prospects.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AMQ) stock is a Hold with a C$0.83 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Abitibi Metals stock, see the TSE:AMQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AMQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AMQ is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak operating fundamentals (no revenue, larger recent losses, and ongoing cash burn), despite a notably low-risk balance sheet with zero debt. Strong technical uptrend indicators support the score, while valuation signals are limited by negative earnings and the lack of a dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AMQ stock, click here.

More about Abitibi Metals

Abitibi Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on high-grade copper-gold polymetallic assets in Quebec’s Abitibi Greenstone Belt. The company advances projects through aggressive drilling, technical studies, and partnerships, targeting resource growth and the development of emerging polymetallic deposits in a key Canadian mining jurisdiction.

An announcement from Alien Metals Ltd ( (GB:UFO) ) is now available.

Alien Metals has highlighted the release of half-year financial reports by two key joint venture partners, West Coast Silver and GreenTech Metals, covering the six months to 31 December 2025. These reports relate to West Coast’s activities and to GreenTech’s role at the Munni Munni platinum group metals project, where Alien retains a minority free-carried interest.

The disclosure underscores Alien’s leveraged exposure to silver and platinum group metal developments in Western Australia through its partners’ progress. While Alien did not provide detailed financial metrics, directing investors instead to the partners’ full filings, the updates signal ongoing operational and corporate activity across its JV portfolio, complementing its core Hancock iron ore development strategy.

Alien Metals Ltd is a mining exploration and development company listed on London’s AIM market under the ticker UFO. data.title: Hydrogen Capital Growth Plans London Delisting and Switch to Private Status
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hydrogenone Capital Growth Plc ( (GB:HGEN) ) has issued an update.

Hydrogen Capital Growth plc has published a circular outlining plans to cancel the listing and trading of its ordinary shares on the FCA’s Official List and the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, and to re-register as a private limited company with new articles of association. Shareholders will vote on the proposals at a general meeting on 30 March 2026, with the cancellation expected on 30 April 2026 if at least 75% of votes cast support it.

The move follows a strategic shift approved in December 2025 to realise the company’s assets over time and aggressive cost-cutting to preserve cash, which stood at about £1.6 million on 11 March 2026. The board, having consulted shareholders representing roughly half of the issued share capital and closed an unneeded investment partnership to reduce expenses, argues that delisting and simplifying the corporate structure will deliver further cost savings and is in the best interests of investors, with a matched bargain facility planned to provide secondary market liquidity post-delisting.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HGEN) stock is a Hold with a £12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hydrogenone Capital Growth Plc stock, see the GB:HGEN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:HGEN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:HGEN is a Neutral.

The score is driven down primarily by volatile profitability and multi-year negative operating/free cash flow, with the technical picture also weak due to a pronounced downtrend and negative MACD. The main stabilizing factor is the debt-free balance sheet, but a negative P/E and no stated dividend yield limit valuation support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:HGEN stock, click here.

More about Hydrogenone Capital Growth Plc

Hydrogen Capital Growth plc is a London-listed closed-ended investment company focused on hydrogen-related assets. It invests in private and listed businesses across the hydrogen value chain, and is managed with an emphasis on cost control and managed realisation of its portfolio to serve shareholders’ interests.

Average Trading Volume: 234,966

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Intercos Updates By-laws After Partial Execution of Performance Share Capital Increase
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Intercos S.p.A. ( (IT:ICOS) ) has provided an announcement.

Intercos S.p.A., a major global B2B cosmetics manufacturer specializing in make-up, skincare and hair and body care products for leading and emerging beauty brands, has built a sizeable international footprint with research centers, production plants and commercial offices on three continents. Leveraging decades of industry experience, it serves a wide range of clients and price segments while positioning itself as a trendsetter in the beauty market.

The company has updated and published its By-laws following the partial execution of a share capital increase linked to its 2023–2025 Performance Shares Plan, making the revised document available at its registered office, on its corporate website and via an authorized storage mechanism. The move formalizes the recent capital change, enhances transparency for investors and other stakeholders, and underscores the ongoing implementation of its long-term incentive program tied to performance shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ICOS) stock is a Hold with a EUR13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Intercos S.p.A. stock, see the IT:ICOS Stock Forecast page.

More about Intercos S.p.A.

Intercos Group is a leading global business-to-business player in the creation, production and marketing of cosmetic make-up, skincare, and hair and body care products for major national and international brands, emerging labels and beauty retailers. Founded in 1972 by Dario Ferrari, the group employs over 6,000 people and operates 12 research centers, 15 production plants and 16 commercial offices across three continents, positioning itself as a long-standing trendsetter in the cosmetics industry.

For more than 50 years, Intercos has focused on interpreting beauty trends and anticipating new developments in the cosmetics world, offering products that cover all price ranges and catering to a broad client base. Its extensive global footprint and deep R&D capabilities support its role as a key supplier to leading cosmetics brands and reinforce its competitive position in the international beauty value chain.

Average Trading Volume: 115,272

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €1.11B

See more insights into ICOS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
